issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Deploy a Next.js app to Hetzner with SSL and zero downtime via Kamal
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `kamal init`, configures servers/web hosts with Traefik labels (certresolver: letsencrypt, websecure entrypoint), defines a healthcheck with path/port/max_attempts, stores secrets in .kamal/secrets, and runs `kamal setup` for first deploy plus `kamal deploy` for updates; baseline writes ad-hoc Docker/nginx scripts without Kamal config structure.

scenarios.name: Multi-server deploy with separate web (×2) and worker (×1) roles in Kamal
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines distinct `servers.web.hosts` (two hosts) and `servers.worker` with a custom `cmd`, shared env (clear + secret), and uses `kamal deploy` for rolling updates plus `kamal app logs -f` / `kamal rollback`; baseline lacks role separation and Kamal-specific commands.
